summary: In weekly email, markdown image comments can leave a lone '!' artifact, and narrow status normalization can hide feature status when teams use localized/non-standard Jira states.
source_links: user-feedback: weekly report had blank statuses for subtask-driven items and a standalone '!' in status/comment lines
details: Strip markdown image patterns ![...](...) before generic markdown link cleanup.
Drop punctuation-only sanitized comments to avoid noise-only status/comment artifacts.
Use broader finished/in-progress normalization (including localized/review states) so subtask-driven features still receive a meaningful status.
Keep deterministic fallback status text when only subtask structure is available and comments are empty/noisy.
